THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TYPEWRITORIUM CO. INC. DBA A2Z BUSINESS SYSTEMS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JACKELIN ESMERALDA ESTRADA, TERRI ANN YEE $758.23 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $784.23, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, ESTRADA, TERRI ANN YEE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ, JACKELIN ESMERALDA ESTRADA, TERRI ANN YEE
